title: poa flaccidula
intro: Poa flaccidula, a type of grass native to New Zealand, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Poa flaccidula include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Poa flaccidula can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
